document_summary: Professional profile of Prof. S. Shyam Sundar from Penn State University's faculty page. Sundar is the James P. Jimirro Professor of Media Effects, founder of the Media Effects Research Laboratory, and a leading scholar in digital media research. He was a keynote speaker at the same 11th China Communication Conference where Liu won the Excellent Paper Award. Profile documents Sundar's extensive credentials including a Stanford PhD, NSF-funded research, ICA Fellowship, testimony before US Congress, and editorship of major journals. Serves as peer achievement and recommender credibility evidence.

snippets.text: James P. Jimirro Professor of Media Effects / Co- Director, Media Effects Research Laboratory / Director, Center for Socially Responsible Artificial Intelligence
snippets.subject: S. Shyam Sundar
snippets.reasoning: Lists Sundar's distinguished titled positions: named/endowed professorship (Jimirro Professor), co-directorship of a leading research laboratory, and directorship of an AI center. Establishes his senior academic standing.

snippets.text: S. Shyam Sundar is the founder of the Media Effects Research Laboratory, a leading facility of its kind in the country. He is Director of the Center for Socially Responsible Artificial Intelligence (https://csrai.psu.edu), an interdisciplinary consortium at Penn State that is devoted to the development and application of AI with an emphasis on its social and ethical implications, enhancing social good and mitigating threats from its misuse.
snippets.subject: S. Shyam Sundar
snippets.reasoning: Establishes Sundar as founder of a nationally leading research facility and director of an interdisciplinary AI center, demonstrating his pioneering role in the field of media effects and digital media research.

snippets.text: In a content analysis of journal articles published during the first decade of the Internet, Sundar was identified as the most published author of Internet- related research in the field of communications, and across 11 leading journals of communications, marketing and advertising (Cho & Khang, 2006; Journal of Advertising, 35: 3, 143- 163).
snippets.subject: S. Shyam Sundar
snippets.reasoning: Quantitative evidence of Sundar's preeminence: identified as the most published author of Internet-related research across 11 leading journals. Directly supports his standing as a top-tier scholar in the field who attended the same conference as Liu.

snippets.text: A frequently cited source on technology, Sundar has testified before US Congress as an expert witness and delivered talks at several universities in the United States, Germany, Netherlands, Hong Kong, Korea, China, Singapore and India. He has served on the editorial boards of over 20 journals, including Communication Research, Journal of Communication, Human Communication Research, Media Psychology, Journalism & Mass Communication Quarterly, Journal of Broadcasting & Electronic Media, and Journal of Advertising.
snippets.subject: S. Shyam Sundar
snippets.reasoning: Documents Sundar's global recognition: testified before US Congress, talks at universities across 8+ countries, editorial board service on 20+ journals. Demonstrates his standing as an internationally recognized expert in the field.

snippets.text: He is a winner of Penn State's Faculty Scholar Medal, for outstanding achievement in social and behavioral sciences. He is a Fellow of ICA, and was elected chair of the Communication & Technology division and Vice- President of ICA, 2008- 2010. He is also a recipient of the Frederick Williams Prize awarded by the division for contribution to the study of communication technology. He is the youngest recipient of the Deutschmann award for research excellence from the Association for Education in Journalism and Mass Communication (AEJMC). His contribution to the field also includes serving as the head of the Communication Technology Division of AEJMC, 2000- 2001. He has also chaired AEJMC's Publications Committee and served on its Strategic Plan Committee.
snippets.subject: S. Shyam Sundar
snippets.reasoning: Extensive awards and leadership positions: ICA Fellow, ICA Vice-President, youngest Deutschmann award recipient, Penn State Faculty Scholar Medal, AEJMC division head. Comprehensively establishes Sundar as a leading figure in the field who attended the same conference as Liu.
